'''vopajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:foetal|foetal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foetal|foetal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vopajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vopajithi|vopajithi]] || [[word:vopajiji|vopajiji]] || [[word:vopajishi|vopajishi]] || [[word:vopajiki|vopajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vopajuthuthu|vopajuthuthu]] || [[word:vopajujuju|vopajujuju]] || [[word:vopajushushu|vopajushushu]] || [[word:vopajukuku|vopajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vopajuthu|vopajuthu]] || [[word:vopajuju|vopajuju]] || [[word:vopajushu|vopajushu]] || [[word:vopajuku|vopajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vopajufthuf|vopajufthuf]] || [[word:vopajufjuf|vopajufjuf]] || [[word:vopajufshuf|vopajufshuf]] || [[word:vopajufkuf|vopajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vopajethe|vopajethe]] || [[word:vopajeje|vopajeje]] || [[word:vopajeshe|vopajeshe]] || [[word:vopajeke|vopajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vopajothotho|vopajothotho]] || [[word:vopajojojo|vopajojojo]] || [[word:vopajoshosho|vopajoshosho]] || [[word:vopajokoko|vopajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vopajotho|vopajotho]] || [[word:vopajojo|vopajojo]] || [[word:vopajosho|vopajosho]] || [[word:vopajoko|vopajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vopajofthof|vopajofthof]] || [[word:vopajofjof|vopajofjof]] || [[word:vopajofshof|vopajofshof]] || [[word:vopajofkof|vopajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfthÃŸf|vopajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfjÃŸf|vopajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfshÃŸf|vopajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfkÃŸf|vopajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vopajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vopajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vopajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vopajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfthÃŸf|vopajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfjÃŸf|vopajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfshÃŸf|vopajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfkÃŸf|vopajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfthÃŸf|vopajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfjÃŸf|vopajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfshÃŸf|vopajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vopajÃŸfkÃŸf|vopajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vopajÃḊthÃḊ|vopajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vopajÃḊjÃḊ|vopajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vopajÃḊshÃḊ|vopajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vopajÃḊkÃḊ|vopajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vopajathatha|vopajathatha]] || [[word:vopajajaja|vopajajaja]] || [[word:vopajashasha|vopajashasha]] || [[word:vopajakaka|vopajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vopajatha|vopajatha]] || [[word:vopajaja|vopajaja]] || [[word:vopajasha|vopajasha]] || [[word:vopajaka|vopajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vopajafthaf|vopajafthaf]] || [[word:vopajafjaf|vopajafjaf]] || [[word:vopajafshaf|vopajafshaf]] || [[word:vopajafkaf|vopajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vopajasha|vopajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vopajshÃḋsha|vopajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vopajrosha|vopajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vopajmusha|vopajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vopajyasha|vopajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govopajnkshÃḋsha|govopajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govopajnkrosha|govopajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govopajnkmusha|govopajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govopajnkyasha|govopajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vopapajasha|vopapajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vopapajshÃḋsha|vopapajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vopapajrosha|vopapajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vopapajmusha|vopapajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vopapajyasha|vopapajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govopapajnkshÃḋsha|govopapajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govopapajnkrosha|govopapajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govopapajnkmusha|govopapajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govopapajnkyasha|govopapajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vepÃḊjasha|vepÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vepÃḊjshÃḋsha|vepÃḊjshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vepÃḊjrosha|vepÃḊjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vepÃḊjmusha|vepÃḊjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vepÃḊjyasha|vepÃḊjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govepÃḊjnkshÃḋsha|govepÃḊjnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govepÃḊjnkrosha|govepÃḊjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govepÃḊjnkmusha|govepÃḊjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govepÃḊjnkyasha|govepÃḊjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vopfajasha|vopfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vopfajshÃḋsha|vopfajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vopfajrosha|vopfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vopfajmusha|vopfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vopfajyasha|vopfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govopfajnkshÃḋsha|govopfajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govopfajnkrosha|govopfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govopfajnkmusha|govopfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govopfajnkyasha|govopfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
